CustomField.formula: IF(ISBLANK( PayerFactor__c ),"", IF( PayerFactor__r.InsuranceCode__c ="31", IMAGE("https://assuta--c.documentforce.com/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?id=0154J000000cgI5&oid=00DKI000000MTJU&lastMod=1561980859000", "" , 30, 30), IF( PayerFactor__r.InsuranceCode__c ="35", IMAGE("https://assuta--c.documentforce.com/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?id=0154J000000cgI0&oid=00DKI000000MTJU&lastMod=1561980796000", "" , 30, 30), IF( PayerFactor__r.InsuranceCode__c ="422", IMAGE("https://assuta--c.documentforce.com/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?id=0154J000000cgIA&oid=00DKI000000MTJU&lastMod=1561980893000", "" , 30, 30), IF( PayerFactor__r.InsuranceCode__c ="974631", IMAGE("https://assuta--c.documentforce.com/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?id=0154J000000cgIF&oid=00DKI000000MTJU&lastMod=1561980952000", "" , 30, 30), IF( PayerFactor__r.InsuranceCode__c ="7", IMAGE("https://assuta--c.documentforce.com/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?id=0154J000000cgIP&oid=00DKI000000MTJU&lastMod=1561981285000", "" , 30, 30), IF( PayerFactor__r.InsuranceCode__c ="47", IMAGE("https://assuta--c.documentforce.com/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?id=0154J000000cgIU&oid=00DKI000000MTJU&lastMod=1561983999000", "" , 30, 30), IF( PayerFactor__r.InsuranceCode__c ="411", IMAGE("https://assuta--c.documentforce.com/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?id=0154J000000cgIZ&oid=00DKI000000MTJU&lastMod=1561982138000", "" , 30, 30), IF( PayerFactor__r.InsuranceCode__c ="412", IMAGE("https://assuta--c.documentforce.com/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?id=0154J000000cgIe&oid=00DKI000000MTJU&lastMod=1561982177000", "" , 30, 30), "" )))))))))
CustomField.label: Shaban Icon
